picks.quote: Waldo is the definition of gangster... I think he's going to lose, bro [referring to Lord Blob vs Waldo]... I think the minus 140 line [for Waldo] is pretty on point.
I feel like uh Morales could get him in a three, but in a five, maybe Bratz.
In a street fight without takedowns against Habib, you actually crack him. Ah, I'd pick Habib, my friend. He's a goat.
Joshua is going to be a disgusting amount larger than Jake Paul. I I really don't think Jake Paul gets him.
I think I'm going to pick Payton Talbot though. I think Cejudo's done.
I'm laying it down on the value side. At plus 375, MMA Joey could potentially cash against the betting market on the heavily favored MMA Guru.
